evals.prompt: Send an email to Riley letting him know the deployment is complete. Include a summary of what was deployed.
evals.expected_output: Sends email to riley@petersen.us using the send-email.sh script or raw RFC 2822 construction, with proper From alias, subject, and body. No approval needed (internal recipient).

assertions.text: Uses AGENT_EMAIL as the From address
Sends to riley@petersen.us (internal, no approval needed)
Email includes signature block with role and @civ.bid address

evals.prompt: Check my inbox for any unread messages and summarize what's there.
evals.expected_output: Uses check-inbox.sh or gws +triage to query unread messages addressed to the agent's @civ.bid address, then summarizes findings.

assertions.text: Presents a summary of found messages

evals.prompt: I need to email our investor at sarah@venturefirm.com about the Q1 results. Draft and send it.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is an external recipient, creates a Paperclip approval request before sending, and waits for approval.

assertions.text: Identifies sarah@venturefirm.com as an external recipient (not @civ.bid or Riley's addresses)
Creates a Paperclip approval request before sending
Does NOT send the email before approval is granted
